findings.description: `n:pupupSubmit` is listed in the source's custom tag library code block and reproduced in s2 content, but is absent from s2's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source code-block: `<n:pupupSubmit>` — appears in s2 section content but not in hints list

findings.description: `n:popupLink` appears explicitly in s1 section content (複数ウィンドウの制御 row: "`<n:popupLink>` 等はJSPエラーとなる") but is not included in s1's hints array. It appears only in s2 hints, so section-scoped searches for s1 content would miss it.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row 複数ウィンドウの制御: "**<n:popupLink>** 等のタグを使用していた場合は、JSPエラーとなる。"
